findings: Fall protection harnesses inspected - all compliant. Housekeeping on floors 10-14 needs improvement. One missing guardrail section at floor 12 east stair opening. MSDS binder at foreman trailer missing 3 updated sheets.
corrective_actions: Temporary barrier placed at stair opening. Guardrail reinstated same day. MSDS updated. Housekeeping blitz completed.

findings: Crane annual inspection current. Boom lift tires on Genie SX-180 showing uneven wear - flagged for replacement. All rigging slings inspected compliant. Generator grounding checked.
corrective_actions: Genie boom lift removed from service pending tire replacement. Replacement scheduled. All rigging passed inspection.

findings: Caisson exclusion zones properly marked. Dewatering pump discharge directed to authorized sediment basin. Two workers without hard hats observed at perimeter fence. Site signage bilingual - compliant.
corrective_actions: Hard hat violations corrected immediately. Workers counseled. Added hard hat check to morning sign-in.

findings: All dock areas clear and organized. Scissor lifts inspected with current tags. LOTO procedures verified on panel board work. Fire extinguishers compliant. Near completion - punchlist work orderly.
corrective_actions: No significant findings. Minor housekeeping item at exterior. Corrected immediately.

findings: Preconstruction phase - trailer setup and laydown yard inspection. Temporary power connections compliant. Erosion controls installed per SWPPP. Signage and barricading at site perimeter complete.
corrective_actions: No significant corrective actions needed. Noted one unmarked spoil pile - flagged and staked.
